websiteQuality.rationale: Modern WordPress site served over HTTPS with a proper viewport meta tag, descriptive title and meta description, and clear mobile-responsive structure. Persistent 'Schedule a Consultation' CTAs route to an anchored Gravity Forms contact form, and click-to-call phone plus a published mailto email lower contact friction. Trust signals are abundant (Board Certification, Super Lawyers, Martindale AV rating, '19 certifications/memberships/honors', detailed attorney bios with bar years) and local positioning is explicit (Lewisville HQ, Denton County Bar, Denton satellite). Deductions: heavy page weight (71 script tags, ~200KB HTML, no lazy-loaded images) and no true online scheduler — booking is form/phone only.

factors.mobileUsability: Responsive viewport meta tag present; WordPress/BeTheme responsive layout with mobile menu
factors.pageSpeed: Not directly measured (no lab tooling); inferred moderate-to-heavy load from ~200KB HTML and 71 script tags including GTM and Gravity Forms, with no lazy-loading on images
factors.accessibility: Images mostly have alt attributes but several decorative images use empty alt; semantic heading structure present; no obvious ARIA issues observed
factors.visualCredibility: Professional design, attorney headshots, office tour photos, consistent branding; not dated
factors.navigation: Clear top navigation with practice-area dropdowns (estate planning, probate, guardianship, litigation, business, real estate), team, about, contact
factors.contentClarity: Detailed attorney bios with bar admissions and education; dedicated practice-area pages; active companion blog (Legal Talk Texas)
factors.callsToAction: Persistent 'Schedule a Consultation' buttons in header and body linking to contact form anchor; newsletter signup; online payment link for existing clients
factors.contactFormQuality: Gravity Forms contact form on contact page (#form anchor) with stated office hours and rates/fees page reference
factors.localPositioning: Explicit: Lewisville HQ address sitewide, 'Proudly Serving Lewisville... Denton...' service-area lists, Denton County Bar Association memberships
factors.trustSignals: Board Certified Civil Trial Law (TBLS), Accredited Estate Planner, Super Lawyers 2012-2022, Martindale-Hubbell AV rating, AVVO 10 rating, Texas Bar Foundation Fellows, named appellate decisions
factors.appointmentBooking: No embedded scheduler widget; consultation requests handled via contact form and phone

notes: Formerly Hammerle Finley Law Firm (renamed Hammerle Morris). HQ in Lewisville (Denton County) with stated satellite offices in Denton and Plano; only the Lewisville address is published on the site. Elder law/probate/guardianship is a core boutique focus alongside business law and civil litigation. Founder Virginia Hammerle writes a weekly Dallas Morning News column on senior issues; firm runs the Legal Talk Texas blog (legaltalktexas.hammerle.com). Seed facts verified correct.
